introduction:
Welcome to the interview. We are interested in your personal experiences and opinions. There are no right or wrong answers. Please answer as honestly as possible.

We will present you with different scenarios, experiences with and attitudes about giving help. For all the examples, please imagine offering help to someone you don't know beforehand.
outro: Thank you for your participation. Please click this link to finish the interview.

questions.main_question: How did you find the interview?
What is your highest level of education?
